chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5063 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.21899/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 6 3. For order on CMA No.21153/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No.21154/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 30.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Abid Rajput advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner allegedly states that some illegal construction has been made on plot of land bearing Survey No.20, measuring 07 acres, Deh Mithan, Baldia Town, District Keamari, Karachi. He has made a complaint to the Mukhtiarkar, Sub-Division Baldia, District Keamari, however, he has not received a reply to the same. Accordingly, the Mukhtiarkar, Sub- Division Baldia, District Keamari, Karachi is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioner, through a speaking order within three months of the date of this order after giving the petitioner an opportunity of personal hearing. The petitioner shall produce the documents of ownership at the time of hearing. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Mukhtiarkar, Sub-Division Baldia, District Keamari, Karachi, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
